testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
15:29:01.260 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.nhnacademy.order.OrderApplicationTests]: OrderApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:29:01.306 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.nhnacademy.order.OrderApplication for test class com.nhnacademy.order.OrderApplicationTests 15:29:01.360 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

cascade Hibernate: create table delivery_policy ( fee integer not null, free_delivery_threshold integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table OrderItem ( orderItemStatus tinyint check (orderItemStatus between 0 and 5), price integer not null, quantity integer not null, bookId bigint, couponId bigint, orderItemId bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, packagingId bigint, primary key (orderItemId) ) Hibernate: create table Orders ( deliveryFee integer, paymentStatus tinyint check (paymentStatus between 0 and 1), pointUsage integer, totalPrice integer, deliveryDate timestamp(6), memberId bigint, orderDate timestamp(6), orderId bigint generated by default as identity, shippingDate timestamp(6), nonMemberPassword varchar(255), orderNumber varchar(255), ordererContact varchar(255), ordererName varchar(255), receiverAddress varchar(255), receiverContact varchar(255), receiverName varchar(255), shippingPostCode varchar(255), primary key (orderId) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists OrderItem add constraint FKea17ekwokumlak9h7eevmkfoc foreign key (order_id) references Orders
